category_sources: source_facts.description identifies tcpflow as a TCP/IP packet demultiplexer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives tcpflow; current_curation.display-name also gives tcpflow.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains installation, build, usage, and introduction documentation for tcpflow.

tags_sources: source_facts.description says TCP/IP packet demultiplexer; official README describes capturing TCP flows for protocol analysis and debugging.
